channel.title: Comments on: Brooklyner-Schneider Hopfen-Weisse, Ep. 149
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In reply to <a href="https://beeramerica.tv/brooklyner-schneider-hopfen-weisse/comment-page-1/#comment-1201">Marco</a>.
Marco, you're the best my friend!! Thank You!!!!!!
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Marco.

Marco, you’re the best my friend!! Thank You!!!!!!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In reply to <a href="https://beeramerica.tv/brooklyner-schneider-hopfen-weisse/comment-page-1/#comment-1203">Foyle</a>.
David actually wanted to sit this one out, so Poggioli jumped in. He's my experiment on how to turn exclusive wine drinkers into beer geeks.
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Foyle.

David actually wanted to sit this one out, so Poggioli jumped in. He’s my experiment on how to turn exclusive wine drinkers into beer geeks.

item.title: By: Foyle
item.dc:creator: Foyle
item.description: David Little should be ON camera with you and Pinkerton on a regular basis. No offense to your neighbor, but keep your tastings with Poggioli confined to the backyard. He seems very uncomfortable in front of the camera.
item.content:encoded: David Little should be ON camera with you and Pinkerton on a regular basis. No offense to your neighbor, but keep your tastings with Poggioli confined to the backyard. He seems very uncomfortable in front of the camera.

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
Still watching! This was a nice show. Great info.
CHEERS Marco
item.content:encoded:
Still watching! This was a nice show. Great info.

CHEERS
Marco
